tutorial.title: How it works (1 of 2)
tutorial.description:
Device Notes attaches a free-text, timestamped **note log** to any device — written by an AI agent (via the `device_notes.append` service) or by you.

Each opted-in device gets two entities on its page: a **Notes** sensor (the log) and a **Note entry** box (type a line, press Enter).

tutorial2.title: How it works (2 of 2)
tutorial2.description:
Attach devices or areas with **+ Add** on the entry — every device in an added area gets a note log automatically.

The optional **Device Notes Card** shows the whole log with agent/you badges, and has its own built-in walkthrough.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Device Notes is already configured. Use + Add to attach more devices or areas.

user.title: Add a device
user.description: Pick a device to attach a note log to.

user.title: Add an area
user.description: Attach a note log to every device in this area.
